subject: economics
description: A-Level Economics 9708. AS: Basic economic ideas, Price system & micro economy, Govt micro intervention, Macro economy, Govt macro intervention. A2: Depth in each area + international economics.

domains.name: 基础经济概念 / Basic Economic Ideas / Basic Economic Ideas

curriculum_points: 2.2.1 definition of price elasticity, income elasticity and cross elasticity of demand (PED, YED, XED)
2.2.2 formulae for and calculation of price elasticity, income elasticity and cross elasticity of demand

2.2.3 significance of relative percentage changes, the size and sign of the coefficient of:
• price elasticity of demand

• cross elasticity of demand

2.2.6 factors affecting:
• price elasticity of demand
• income elasticity of demand
• cross elasticity of demand

nodes.name: 经济体制
curriculum_points: 1.1.1 fundamental economic problem of scarcity
1.1.2 need to make choices at all levels (individuals, firms, governments)
1.1.3 nature and definition of opportunity cost, arising from choices

The fundamental problem in economics is that resources are scarce and wants are unlimited, so there is always a choice required between competing uses for the resources and an opportunity cost in making this choice.
